title: cymbopogon quinhonensis
intro: Cymbopogon quinhonensis, also known as Vietnamese lemongrass, is a type of grass native to Vietnam and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like citral and geraniol, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cymbopogon quinhonensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cymbopogon quinhonensis include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
